name: ms_vlm_ct_report_tool
description: Generate a brain CT report from a preprocessed 3D NIfTI volume using the MS-VLM CT-report generation model.

help.summary: Run MS-VLM brain CT report generation on the active NIfTI source.

modes.name: report
modes.description: Generate a free-text brain CT report from the active preprocessed 3D NIfTI volume.

options.name: cfg_path
options.description: Override the MS-VLM YAML config path. Defaults to the bundled model/eval_configs/brainct_stage2.yaml, or MS_VLM_CT_CFG_PATH if set.

options.name: checkpoint_path
options.description: Override model checkpoint path. Must point inside plugins/vllama_ct_report_tool/model/weights/.

options.name: vit_path
options.description: Override DINO/vision checkpoint path. Must point inside plugins/vllama_ct_report_tool/model/weights/.

options.name: gpu_id
options.description: CUDA device id used to load MS-VLM.

options.name: max_new_tokens
options.description: Maximum generated tokens for the report.

notes: The active source must be a NIfTI brain CT volume.
The model is loaded lazily on the first run and reused for later calls in the same backend process.
This tool requires CUDA and the MS-VLM Python dependencies.
